creator: marks@ripe.net
text:
The addition of KSE in -CURRENT has broken vmware2.

Fix: 

The following patch solves the problem:
http://www.ripe.net/home/mark/files/vmware2_kse_17-sept.patch.tgz

Please make it a conditional patch for -CURRENT after KSE.

The patch is approved by Julian (author of KSE)
How-To-Repeat: N/A
